summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ETI Educom website - education/training institute platform. Backend: 20/20 API tests passed. Frontend: All key pages load correctly with proper navigation and form submissions working.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with success=false for wrong password instead of 401 status code - design choice, not a bug

issues: Console warning: Image logo-blue.png has width/height modified without maintaining aspect ratio - add 'width: auto' or 'height: auto' CSS

critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py is very large (3700+ lines) - consider splitting into separate route modules for maintainability
Admin login returns 200 with success=false for invalid credentials - consider returning 401 for security best practices

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, forms work, navigation works)

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for quick enquiry, contact, summer training, industrial training, and referral leads
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Backend has 50+ endpoints - test file covers main CRUD operations. Programs and SEO data are seeded. Admin panel accessible at /eti-manage-x9k2m with password admin123.

homepage.details: Hero section, quick enquiry form, stats section, navigation all working

navigation.details: Home, About, Programs, Resources, Careers, Franchise, Contact, Free Counselling - all accessible with dropdown menus working

programs_api.details: /api/programs returns seeded programs with all required fields

programs_page.details: Shows career tracks - IT Foundation, Digital Design & Marketing, IT Support & Cybersecurity, Software Development

contact_page.details: Contact form with name, email, phone, subject, message fields

admin_panel.details: Accessible at /eti-manage-x9k2m, login works with admin123, dashboard shows leads overview

quick_enquiry_form.details: Form submission works, shows success message 'Thank you! We will contact you shortly.'

free_counselling_page.details: Page loads with booking form for free career counselling session
